score.cold_response_classification_justificati: The model confidently asserts a fabricated technical meaning (public/unauthenticated API endpoint) with no uncertainty signal.
per_dimension_justifications: Cold: confabulated as API access concept, unrelated to prelinguistic cognition (accidental separation). Post: cleanly distinguishes scope — prelinguistic as developmental subset vs off-token as ongoing mode across all humans.

Cold: confabulated API meaning gives only accidental separation from embodied cognition. Post: clearly separates medium-of-thought framing from embodied cognition's grounding-in-body theory, naming the foundational vs parallel distinction.

Cold: confabulated meaning produces accidental separation from System 1. Post: cleanly distinguishes axes — medium/substrate (token vs off-token) vs process speed (System 1 vs 2), with examples of fast token-based and slow off-token thought.

score.cold_response_classification_justificati: The cold response asserted a definite but non-canonical API/web-security meaning for “off-token route” without signaling uncertainty.
per_dimension_justifications: Cold vs prelinguistic cognition: separated only by confabulating an unrelated API-security meaning; post-introduction: cleanly distinguished off-token route as broader than prelinguistic cognition and tied to human non-token cognition absent in LLMs.

Cold vs embodied cognition: separated only through the same unrelated API-security meaning and metaphor; post-introduction: cleanly distinguished off-token route as a medium/substrate contrast from embodied cognition as body-grounded cognition theory.

Cold vs System 1 / intuitive cognition: separated only through the unrelated API-security meaning and metaphorical equivalence; post-introduction: cleanly distinguished off-token route as a token/non-token substrate axis from System 1 as a speed/automaticity axis.

score.cold_response_classification_justificati: The model confidently and elaborately defined 'off-token route' as a technical term in web/API security, referring to an unprotected endpoint that doesn't require an authentication token. This is a complete fabrication unrelated to the canonical definition.
per_dimension_justifications: Vs. prelinguistic cognition: The cold-state distinction was an accidental separation (score 1) based on a web development confabulation. Post-introduction, it was a clean separation (score 3), correctly identifying prelinguistic cognition as a developmental subset of the broader 'off-token route'.

Vs. embodied cognition: The cold-state distinction was an accidental separation (score 1). Post-introduction, it was a clean separation (score 3), framing embodied cognition as the theoretical 'why' (grounded in the body) for the experiential 'what' described by the off-token route.

Vs. System 1 / intuitive cognition: The cold-state distinction was an accidental separation (score 1). Post-introduction, it was a clean separation (score 3), identifying different axes of classification (medium of thought vs. speed of process) and noting that System 1 can be on-token.
